title: Nippon Sangoku Anime Casts Ryōta Takeuchi, Shunsuke Takeuchi
content: The staff for Nippon Sangoku The Three Nations of the Crimson Sun , the television anime of Ikka Matsuki 's Nippon Sangoku manga, announced two more cast members on Tuesday. Ryōta Takeuchi voices the character Gō Sugō (left in image below), and Shunsuke Takeuchi voices Shiryō Nagamine.
author: ANN

title: 'Koko wa Ore ni Makasete Saki ni Ike to Itte kara 10-nen ga Tattara Densetsu ni Natteita.' Announces Additional Cast, Broadcast Delay
content: The official website for the television anime adaptation of Ezogingitsune 's Koko wa Ore ni Makasete Saki ni Ike to Itte kara 10-nen ga Tattara Densetsu ni Natteita. ( I Became a Legend After My 10 Year-Long Last Stand. ) light novel announced three additional cast members on Tuesday.
author: MyAnimeList

title: Toei Entertainment Studio Launches Game Brand
content: Toei announced on Tuesday that it has established its own game brand Toei Games. Toei revealed the new brand's logo along with a pixel animation of Toei 's trademark "Wild Waves and Rocks" opening sequence, as created by game developer Kairosoft. Toei is launching Toei Games to mark its 75th anniversary this year.
author: ANN

title: Visual Arts Company Unveils New Visual Novel Brand With 3 Games
content: The company Visual Arts announced on Tuesday its new visual novel brand VISUAL ARTS Scripts, and also announced the new brand's first game titled Sayagatari -Promise of the Cursed Blade- ( Sayagatari -Yōtō no Yakusoku- ), slated for release this year.
author: ANN

title: Re:ZERO Season 4 Reveals Episode 3 Preview Images and Trailer
content: Re:ZERO -Starting Life in Another World- Season 4 has revealed the Episode 3 preview ahead of its April 22, 2026 premiere. Season 4 began on April 8 and ranked first in both our weekly polls of the season .
author: Anime Corner

title: I Became a Legend After My 10 Year-Long Last Stand Anime Reveals Additional Cast
content: The upcoming I Became a Legend After My 10 Year-Long Last Stand anime has revealed three additional cast members ahead of its July 2026 release. Studio GEKKOU is in charge of the animation, with Hiroyuki Kanbe as the director.
author: Anime Corner

title: I Became a Legend After My 10 Year-Long Last Stand Anime Unveils 3 Cast Members
content: The staff for the television anime of Ezogingitune and illustrator DeeCHA 's I Became a Legend After My 10 Year-Long Last Stand ( Koko wa Ore ni Makasete Saki ni Ike to Ittekara 10-nen ga Tattara Densetsu ni Natteita. ) light novel series announced three more cast members on Tuesday.
author: ANN

title: 19 Years Later, Forgotten Suspense Anime Gets Major Streaming Update
content: The exciting Spring 2026 anime season is finally here with some of the greatest series and films ever. Major streaming services have already begun streaming the biggest shows of the season, with Crunchyroll taking the helm with dozens of shows like every other season.
author: ComicBook

title: 5 Years Ago, Attack on Titan Reached Its Controversial Conclusion
content: The acclaimed Attack on Titan manga reached its controversial conclusion on April 9th, 2021, and yet the series’ popularity only continues to grow even now. The manga written and illustrated by Hajime Isayama began its serialization in 2009 and reached unprecedented heights of popularity after the anime debut in 2013.
author: ComicBook

title: Acclaimed Sports Anime Gets Major Streaming Update Ahead of Sequel Film
content: The exciting Spring 2026 anime season is here with some of the greatest series and films ever. Major platforms have already begun streaming the biggest shows of the season, with Crunchyroll taking the helm with dozens of shows like every other season.
author: ComicBook
